blocks.body: Present Perfect Continuous: przeczenia — haven't / hasn't been + V-ing dla czynności, które nie trwają, nie dzieją się ostatnio albo nie są w toku tak, jak oczekujemy.

{"level":"A2–B1","intro":"W przeczeniach w Present Perfect Continuous używamy have not / has not been + V-ing albo krótkich form haven't / hasn't been.","rules":[{"label":"haven't / hasn't been + V-ing","color":"emerald","text":"Przeczenie buduje się przez have / has, a nie przez do / does.","example":"I haven't been sleeping well. / She hasn't been studying."},{"label":"Lately / recently","color":"blue","text":"Takie przeczenia często mówią, że coś nie działo się ostatnio.","example":"We haven't been going out much lately."},{"label":"Unfinished time","color":"amber","text":"Przeczenie działa też z today, this week albo for / since, gdy proces nie zachodził do teraz.","example":"He hasn't been coming to class this week."}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowe modele przeczenia","intro":"Zacznij od have / has, dodaj not, potem been i V-ing.","items":[{"label":"I / You / We / They","title":"haven't been + V-ing","subtitle":"I haven't been sleeping well. / They haven't been working."},{"label":"He / She / It","title":"hasn't been + V-ing","subtitle":"She hasn't been waiting long. / It hasn't been working properly."},{"label":"Recent time","title":"lately / recently","subtitle":"I haven't been feeling well lately. / We haven't been seeing them recently."},{"label":"Duration and unfinished periods","title":"for / since / this week","subtitle":"She hasn't been living here for long. / He hasn't been coming this week."}]}

{"title":"2. Kiedy potrzebne jest przeczenie","sections":[{"label":"Proces nie zachodzi","color":"emerald","description":"Pokaż, że czynność nie trwa albo nie dzieje się w tym okresie.","examples":[{"en":"I haven't been working much this week.","ua":"Proces jest ograniczony w tym niezakończonym okresie."},{"en":"She hasn't been sleeping enough lately.","ua":"To nie działo się ostatnio."}]},{"label":"Problem albo zmiana","color":"blue","description":"Przeczenie często opisuje sytuację, która się zmieniła albo nie przebiega tak, jak oczekiwaliśmy.","examples":[{"en":"We haven't been getting your messages.","ua":"Jest obecny problem."},{"en":"He hasn't been feeling well recently.","ua":"Ostatnio sytuacja jest zła."}]},{"label":"Niezakończony okres","color":"amber","description":"Powiedz, że w bieżącym okresie proces nie zachodził.","examples":[{"en":"They haven't been coming to the office this month.","ua":"Ten miesiąc jeszcze się nie skończył."},{"en":"I haven't been using the car lately.","ua":"Brakuje ostatnio powtarzającej się czynności."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Szybkie modele","intro":"Zobacz, jak działają przeczenia w tym czasie.","rows":[{"en":"I haven't been sleeping well lately.","ua":"haven't been sleeping","note":"stan albo proces ostatnio"},{"en":"She hasn't been working this week.","ua":"hasn't been working","note":"niezakończony okres"},{"en":"We haven't been waiting for long.","ua":"haven't been waiting","note":"długość trwania w formie przeczącej"},{"en":"He hasn't been talking much recently.","ua":"hasn't been talking","note":"brak niedawnej aktywności"}],"warning":"Nie mów I don't been working ani She hasn't working."}

{"title":"4. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Używanie do / does zamiast have / has.","wrong":"❌ I don't been sleeping well.","right":"✅ I haven't been sleeping well."},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Pomijanie been w formule.","wrong":"❌ She hasn't working lately.","right":"✅ She hasn't been working lately."},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Używanie V1 zamiast V-ing.","wrong":"❌ We haven't been wait long.","right":"✅ We haven't been waiting long."}]}

{"title":"5. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Przeczenie w Present Perfect Continuous = haven't / hasn't been + V-ing.","Używaj haven't been z I / you / we / they.","Używaj hasn't been z he / she / it.","Te formy często pojawiają się z lately, recently, for, since i niezakończonymi okresami, jak this week.","Po been używaj czasownika z -ing."]}

{"title":"Lekcje Present Perfect Continuous","items":[{"label":"Forma i użycie","url":"/pl/theory/present-perfect-continuous/present-perfect-continuous-forms","current":false},{"label":"Przeczenia","url":"/pl/theory/present-perfect-continuous/present-perfect-continuous-negatives","current":true},{"label":"Pytania i krótkie odpowiedzi","url":"/pl/theory/present-perfect-continuous/present-perfect-continuous-questions","current":false},{"label":"Określenia czasu","url":"/pl/theory/present-perfect-continuous/present-perfect-continuous-time-expressions","current":false}]}
